item.title: A message from: Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a Unity Club meeting today at lunch in room 127. Join us to help plan and coordinate our events for Asian Heritage Month, Multicultural Day, and Pride Month. All are welcome!

item.title: A message from Mr. Warner:
item.description: The 7 - 8 girls' basketball team played St. Joes from Cornwall yesterday and came away with a resounding win - their coaches are super proud of them! This team of girls played very hard the entire season and received many compliments from other teams, coaches and referees about their sportsmanship as well. Saying "great job girls" does not do you justice - you were awesome! Congratulations ladies, you represented STA with class and should be very proud of your efforts!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Mrs. Longval's Period 1 Personal Fitness class is asked to please meet in room 207 for today's class.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Today is the final day for our Lunchtime Volleyball Tournament. Teams are reminded to arrive early to warm up and to make sure they have replacement players if anyone is absent or unable to play. Please see Mr. Longval if you have any questions about today's matches.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: The Weight Room is closed today due to the volleyball tournament. Back to a regular schedule next week!

item.title: A message from Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminder to SHSM students to please check their TEAMS messages and pages for important messages regarding upcoming certifications and training sessions. Please reach out to Mrs. Longval if you have any questions.
